name: MyDx, Inc.
summary: MyDx, Inc., a science and technology company, develops products and services focusing on the cannabis industry. It focuses on four business segments: Consumer Products, Data Analytics, Biopharmaceutical, and Software as a Service (SaaS). The Consumer Products segment provides smart devices and consumables, including CannaDx sensors, delivery devices, and MyDx 2 sensors. The Data Analytics segment offers pre-clinical chemical analysis and patient feedback ecosystem. The Biopharmaceutical segment engages in identifying, licensing, and selling green active pharmaceutical ingredients and corresponding formulations. The SaaS segment provides software services for prescribers, patient groups, cultivators, and regulators. The company distributes its products through various channels, including e-commerce via the company's Website, direct to retail, amazon.com, and sales through affiliate partners. MyDx, Inc. was founded in 2012 and is based in San Diego, California.
